label: Siderglass Canopy
description: Siderglass Canopy constitutes a prism-forest rooted in Kharion Prismworld’s vitreous crust, where faceted trunks rise as columnar prisms and branch into blade-like fronds that lock into repeating angles. The canopy refracts Vesper Node’s meridian glare into rigid bands of colored light, separated by corridors of absolute shadow that remain fixed across the forest floor. Underfoot, the ground forms a tessellated mosaic of cracked glass and dark crystalline grit, scored by rectilinear seams aligned to the planet’s fracture-belt geometry. Sound carries as clean, metallic chimes along the laminar air-sheets, giving the woodland a constant, ordered resonance.
